description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, likely for intermediate cartridges, and a green fabric sling attached for carrying. The front and rear iron sights are visible, with the front sight post protected by side ears and the rear sight mounted on the receiver. The muzzle end appears to have a simple slant compensator or flash hider. The overall design is robust, with a utilitarian finish and visible screws and rivets along the receiver. The wood grain on the stock and handguard adds a traditional aesthetic to the otherwise utilitarian firearm.
description: A black metal assault rifle with wooden stock, handguard, and grip, featuring a curved magazine and green sling. Iron sights and a slant muzzle device are visible.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the front sight post and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and attached sling.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the buttstock end, showing the rear sight, the top of the receiver, and the slim profile of the stock.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the ejection port, fire selector, and the full wooden furniture, as well as the magazine and sling.
